title: crepidiastrum humifusum
intro: Crepidiastrum humifusum, also known as creeping Asian wormwood, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The essential oils and extracts of Crepidiastrum humifusum have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, offering potential health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Crepidiastrum humifusum are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or combined with other herbs in remedies for digestive issues and skin problems.
